query: How is the sign-on BMS map COSGN00 structured?

results.name: COSGN00
results.content:
COSGN00 DFHMSD CTRL=(ALARM,FREEKB),                                    -
               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COSGN0A
results.content:
COSGN0A DFHMDI COLUMN=1,                                               -
               LINE=1,                                                 -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran :'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,8)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(1,64),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date :'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog :'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,8)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(2,64),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time :'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=9,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='Ahh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(3,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='AppID:'
APPLID  DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(3,8)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=6,                                               -
               POS=(3,64),                                             -
               INITIAL='SysID:'
SYSID   DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,PROT),                                 -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(3,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='        '
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=66,                                              -
               POS=(5,6),                                              -
               INITIAL='This is a Credit Card Demo Application for Main-
               frame Modernization'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(7,21),                                             -
               INITIAL='+========================================+'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(8,21),                                             -
               INITIAL='|%%%%%%%  NATIONAL RESERVE NOTE  %%%%%%%%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(9,21),                                             -
               INITIAL='|%(1)  THE UNITED STATES OF KICSLAND (1)%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(10,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='|%$$              ___       ********  $$%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(11,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='|%$    {x}       (o o)                 $%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(12,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='|%$     ******  (  V  )      O N E     $%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(13,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='|%(1)          ---m-m---             (1)%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(14,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='|%%~~~~~~~~~~~ ONE DOLLAR ~~~~~~~~~~~~~%%|'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=42,                                              -
               POS=(15,21),                                            -
               INITIAL='+========================================+'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=49,                                              -
               POS=(17,16),                                            -
               INITIAL='Type your User ID and Password, then press ENTE-
               R:'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=13,                                              -
               POS=(19,29),                                            -
               INITIAL='User ID     :'
USERID  DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=OFF,                                            -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(19,43)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(19,52)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(19,52),                                            -
               INITIAL='(8 Char)'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=13,                                              -
               POS=(20,29),                                            -
               INITIAL='Password    :'
PASSWD  DFHMDF ATTRB=(DRK,FSET,UNPROT),                                -
               COLOR=GREEN,

results.content:

               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -

               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM
